  desc: 'Iconic split leaves that make a bold statement in luxury floral arrangements and event décor.',

  desc: 'Broad, glossy leaves in rich green or deep burgundy. A staple of Hawaiian and tropical arrangements.',
  uses: ['Leis', 'Tropical Arrangements', 'Table Runners'],
  details: 'Ti Leaf is a cornerstone of tropical floristry, valued for its broad glossy surface and long-lasting freshness. Available in green and deep red-burgundy varieties, it provides a strong structural base in any arrangement.'
}, {
  id: 4,
  emoji: '✨',
  name: 'Dracaena Leaves',
  latin: 'Dracaena marginata',
  color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4d1a1a 0%, #8c3d3d 100%)',

  desc: 'Long, arching sword-like leaves with red-edged margins. Adds dramatic height to arrangements.',
  uses: ['Tall Arrangements', 'Corporate Events', 'Modernist Décor'],
  details: 'Dracaena Marginata leaves offer dramatic length and a striking two-tone colour — deep green with vivid red margins. A favourite for modern minimalist floristry and large-scale event installations.'
}, {
  id: 5,
  emoji: '🌴',
  name: 'Palm Leaf',
  latin: 'Livistona chinensis',
  color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3a1a 0%, #5c8c2d 100%)',

  name: 'Leather Leaf Fern',
  latin: 'Rumohra adiantiformis',
  color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2d1a 0%, #3d6b3d 100%)',

  details: 'Leather Leaf Fern is the backbone of the global cut foliage industry. Its tough, glossy fronds last up to 3 weeks in a vase and tolerate handling extremely well. Available year-round from our estate in consistent quality.'

sourcesContent:
// ============================================================
//  CUT FOLIAGE PLANTS DATA
//  Add or edit your cut foliage plants here
// ============================================================

const CUT_FOLIAGE = [
  {
    id: 1,
    emoji: '🌿',
    name: 'Asparagus Fern',
    latin: 'Asparagus setaceus',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a4d35 0%, #3d8c5e 100%)',
    badge: 'Best Seller',
    desc: 'Feathery, delicate fronds that add a soft texture to any floral arrangement. Long vase life.',
    uses: ['Bouquets', 'Wreaths', 'Table décor'],
    details: 'Asparagus Fern is one of the most popular cut foliage choices worldwide. Its fine, wispy texture complements both tropical and classic floral designs. Harvested fresh from our estate, it stays green and vibrant for 10–14 days in a vase.',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    emoji: '🍃',
    name: 'Monstera Leaf',
    latin: 'Monstera deliciosa',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3d2b 0%, #4a9968 100%)',
    badge: 'Trending',
    desc: 'Iconic split leaves that make a bold statement in luxury floral arrangements and event décor.',
    uses: ['Event Décor', 'Luxury Bouquets', 'Centrepieces'],
    details: 'Monstera leaves are the hallmark of tropical luxury floristry. Each large, glossy leaf features the iconic natural splits that make it instantly recognisable. Used extensively in high-end weddings, corporate events, and photo shoots.',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    emoji: '🌱',
    name: 'Ti Leaf',
    latin: 'Cordyline fruticosa',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #2d1a4d 0%, #7a3d8c 100%)',
    badge: null,
    desc: 'Broad, glossy leaves in rich green or deep burgundy. A staple of Hawaiian and tropical arrangements.',
    uses: ['Leis', 'Tropical Arrangements', 'Table Runners'],
    details: 'Ti Leaf is a cornerstone of tropical floristry, valued for its broad glossy surface and long-lasting freshness. Available in green and deep red-burgundy varieties, it provides a strong structural base in any arrangement.',
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    emoji: '✨',
    name: 'Dracaena Leaves',
    latin: 'Dracaena marginata',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4d1a1a 0%, #8c3d3d 100%)',
    badge: 'Exclusive',
    desc: 'Long, arching sword-like leaves with red-edged margins. Adds dramatic height to arrangements.',
    uses: ['Tall Arrangements', 'Corporate Events', 'Modernist Décor'],
    details: 'Dracaena Marginata leaves offer dramatic length and a striking two-tone colour — deep green with vivid red margins. A favourite for modern minimalist floristry and large-scale event installations.',
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    emoji: '🌴',
    name: 'Palm Leaf',
    latin: 'Livistona chinensis',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3a1a 0%, #5c8c2d 100%)',
    badge: null,
    desc: 'Fan-shaped tropical palm leaves that create a dramatic tropical backdrop for any event.',
    uses: ['Backdrops', 'Beach Events', 'Wedding Arches'],
    details: 'Fan Palm leaves are perfect for creating lush tropical backdrops at weddings, beach parties, and resort events. Their large fan shape provides impressive coverage and their natural waxy surface keeps them looking fresh for days.',
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    emoji: '🌾',
    name: 'Leather Leaf Fern',
    latin: 'Rumohra adiantiformis',
    color: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2d1a 0%, #3d6b3d 100%)',
    badge: 'Popular',
    desc: 'Tough, dark green fronds with a leathery texture. The most widely used cut foliage in floristry.',
    uses: ['All Bouquets', 'Funeral Sprays', 'Garlands'],
    details: 'Leather Leaf Fern is the backbone of the global cut foliage industry. Its tough, glossy fronds last up to 3 weeks in a vase and tolerate handling extremely well. Available year-round from our estate in consistent quality.',
  },
];

export default CUT_FOLIAGE;
